title: taraxacum litophyllum
intro: Taraxacum litophyllum, also known as the rock dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its ability to thrive in rocky and sandy environments. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum litophyllum are attributed to its high concentration of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that can help support gut health and improve digestion. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Taraxacum litophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
